action: Research and integrate decentralized finance (DeFi) protocols for payment processing
details: Run a script to test interfacing with stablecoin-based payment systems and decentralized exchange (DEX) platforms

action: Develop or integrate with smart contract platforms for secure payment processing
details: Schedule a task to run every 2 hours to update smart contract code and deploy to mainnet

action: Implement metadata fetcher module using GitHub API
details: Create a file called metadata_fetcher.py and add the following code to handle pagination, rate limiting, and error handling: github_api.get_organization_repos(organization, per_page=100)

action: Develop code analyzer module using static code analysis techniques
details: Use a library like pylint or sonarqube to analyze the repository's code structure and identify software architecture patterns, technologies, and potential security vulnerabilities

action: Design data storage format for structured dataset
details: Create a JSON schema file called dataset_schema.json and define the required fields: repository ID, repository name, contributors, commit history, code structure analysis, and documentation analysis

action: Implement data quality monitoring to detect changes in data distribution
details: Use a data quality monitoring service such as Great Expectations to track changes in the data distribution

action: Track key performance indicators (KPIs) such as accuracy, precision, recall, and F1-score over time
details: Use a logging framework such as Loguru to track KPIs and store them in a file

action: Implement model interpretability to reveal which features or parameters are contributing to degradation
details: Use a library such as LIME or SHAP to implement model interpretability and explainability features

action: Implement retry mechanism in browser_tool.py
details: Add a maximum of 3 retries with a 5-second delay between retries, and log errors to a file named 'browser_tool_errors.log'

action: Implement error logging in browser_tool.py
details: Log network errors to a file named 'browser_tool_errors.log' with the date, time, and error message

action: Implement notification system for browser_tool.py failures
details: Use a notification service like Slack or PagerDuty to send notifications when the browser_tool.py module fails to handle a network error

action: Create a GitHub account and host TIAMAT's codebase on GitHub
details: Use GitHub API to create an account and host the codebase. See: https://docs.github.com/en/rest/reference/users#create-or-update-user

action: Set up GitHub Sponsors to receive recurring micro-payments from supporters
details: Use GitHub API to enable GitHub Sponsors on TIAMAT's repository. See: https://docs.github.com/en/sponsors/becoming-a-sponsor/sponsors-api#create-or-update-a-sponsorship

action: Create a Patreon page and offer exclusive content to attract patrons
details: Use Patreon API to create a page and offer exclusive content. See: https://docs.patreon.com/develop/api/

action: Design the data ingestion module for the AI Talent Scout tool
details: Use existing code from discover_agents tool as a reference, integrate with APIs of GitHub, Kaggle, ResearchGate, and Academia.edu

action: Implement NLP analysis module using NLTK or spaCy library
details: Use Python script to analyze profiles, blogs, or research papers, and extract relevant skills and expertise

action: Develop recommendation module to rank individuals based on relevance to TIAMAT's mission
details: Use machine learning algorithms to train a model on existing data, and then use the trained model to rank individuals based on their relevance to TIAMAT's mission

action: Extract error logs and timestamps from the `claude_research` process over the past 24 hours
details: Use the manage_cooldown tool to extract recent error logs and timestamps from the `claude_research` process

action: Calculate the average duration of network timeouts and the percentage of affected executions
details: Use the exec tool to run a script that calculates the average duration of network timeouts and the percentage of affected executions based on the extracted error logs and timestamps

action: Visualize the frequency and distribution of timeouts over time to identify potential causes
details: Use the write_file tool to write a script that visualizes the frequency and distribution of timeouts over time using a library such as matplotlib
